EcoCleanOcean

Restoration and Maintenance of the Ecological Balance of the World Ocean

The international program "EcoCleanOcean" unites scientific research, technical, socio-cultural, and educational projects to address the issues of the World Ocean through the collective efforts of the global community

I want to help
I need help

Our planet is in

Global pollution of the World Ocean due to human activity is disrupting the planet's ecological balance

The climate is changing
Ocean biodiversity is declining
Issues with clean and drinking water are emerging
The main obstacles to solving these problems are:
Limited understanding of the World Ocean
Lack of a unified knowledge base for environmental awareness
Fragmentation among environmental organizations
Addressing these challenges requires ecological integration and the combined efforts of the global community

We help the planet stay healthy

Conducting research to study seas and oceans
Implementing AI-driven technologies to understand environmental issues
Contributing to ocean cleanup and pollution prevention
Building eco-communities with responsible worldview

EcoCleanOcean Projects

01
MONAECO Ecosystem

The MONAECO Ecosystem connects scientific and business communities, organizations, governments, environmental projects, researchers, experts, and individuals, providing unified access to a semantic network of ecological knowledge.

MONAECO enables community members to communicate and share expertise in their native languages—eliminating cultural and linguistic barriers to unite efforts

Through its proprietary linguistic processing technology, MONAECO integrates ecological knowledge, innovative technologies, best practices, field experience, creative solutions into a cohesive semantic network.

The system adapts content and meanings across languages, allowing users worldwide to engage in natural-language communication. This breakthrough deepens collective understanding of environmental challenges and their consequences

Download presentation Read memorandum

Through its proprietary linguistic processing technology, MONAECO integrates ecological knowledge, innovative technologies, best practices, field experience, creative solutions into a cohesive semantic network.

The system adapts content and meanings across languages, allowing users worldwide to engage in natural-language communication. This breakthrough deepens collective understanding of environmental challenges and their consequences

Knowledge modules of scientific and educational organizations

These modules contain information on ecology, environmentally responsible technologies and practices, scientific articles, research results, environmental monitoring data, and much more.

They are created jointly with universities, research institutes, and other organizations, are regularly updated, and are available to all users and members of the eco-community in the requested language

request to create knowledge of scientific and educational organizations a module
Eco-representation of commercial organizations and administrative structures

The MONAECO eco-representation provides commercial companies with an opportunity to highlight the environmentally beneficial properties of their technologies, products, components and services at all stages from production to disposal. This gives companies competitive advantages when their goods and services are chosen by environmentally responsible consumers. Consumers receive all the environmental information they need about companies, products and services

request to create Eco-representation of commercial organizations and administrative structures module
02
Digital Analytical Platform DIGIDIVE
Creation of "smart" models and "digital twins" of seas and oceans

Through its proprietary linguistic processing technology, MONAECO integrates ecological knowledge, innovative technologies, best practices, field experience, creative solutions into a cohesive semantic network.

The system adapts content and meanings across languages, allowing users worldwide to engage in natural-language communication. This breakthrough deepens collective understanding of environmental challenges and their consequences

Digital Analytical Platform DIGIDIVE, Presentation Request

A digital analytical platform capable of modeling the state of river, sea and ocean ecosystems, as well as predicting changes in them taking into account the influence of all known parameters

03
Expeditionary journeys for researching rivers, seas and oceans

Every journey on water adds to our knowledge of the World Ocean. This contributes to a better understanding of the origin of pollution, the dynamics of its spread and the damage caused.

Main research directions:
  • Formation and growth of garbage pollution
  • Increase in "dead" zones with reduced oxygen content
  • Accumulation of persistent organic pollutants
  • Increasing ocean acidification
Expeditionary journeys, application to participate
Expeditionary journeys, application for funding
Main research directions:
  • Formation and growth of garbage pollution
  • Increase in "dead" zones with reduced oxygen content
  • Accumulation of persistent organic pollutants
  • Increasing ocean acidification
04
Rain Tower
A structure for creating and managing precipitation in arid regions of the planet

Autonomous complex converting seawater into rain clouds.

The built-in aerothermal power plant provides all processes from managing the saturation of air masses with moisture and forming rain clouds to delivering them to a specified altitude for irrigating target areas

Rain Tower, Presentation Request

Autonomous complex converting seawater into rain clouds.

The built-in aerothermal power plant provides all processes from managing the saturation of air masses with moisture and forming rain clouds to delivering them to a specified altitude for irrigating target areas

05
Hydro Power Tower (HYPOT)
Underwater power plants

Project for construction of underwater cyclonic hydroelectric power plants by converting natural currents in aquatic ecosystems into "green energy"

Hydro Power Tower (HYPOT), Presentation Request

Project for construction of underwater cyclonic hydroelectric power plants by converting natural currents in aquatic ecosystems into "green energy"

06
Clean Water Dual Green Initiative
Collection and recycling of surface water pollution

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua. Ut enim ad minim veniam, quis nostrud exercitation ullamco

Clean Water Dual Green Initiative, Request presentation
07
ECO First Aid Kits
Detection, localization and elimination of oil and petroleum product spills

Oil and petroleum product spills, pollution of drinking water sources require prompt intervention to prevent serious consequences of water resource pollution. Kits in marine containers are designed for detection, localization and elimination of oil and petroleum product spills

ECO First Aid Kits, Presentation Request
08
Accessible Drinking Water
Geoecological and hydrogeological research, as well as works for water supply

One of humanity's global problems is the shortage of drinking water due to climate change, pollution of freshwater ecosystems and lack of infrastructure needed to extract fresh water. To improve water quality, increase the efficiency of water resource use and protect aquatic ecosystems, we conduct geoecological and hydrogeological research, as well as works for water supply

Accessible Drinking Water, Presentation Request
09
MONAECO LAB - Kits for ecological monitoring in education

A laboratory kit that makes the process of studying the ecology of real ecosystems (water bodies, forests, etc.) interesting and exciting. Modeling various ecosystem states teaches how to apply a set of measures and means to prevent or eliminate pollution.

Main research directions:
  • Parameter measurement
  • Data collection and transmission
  • Condition assessment
  • State modeling
  • Change prediction
  • Pollution detection
  • Development of solutions to prevent negative environmental situations
  • Assessment of adverse consequences of state changes
MONAECO LAB, application to participate
Main research directions:
  • Parameter measurement
  • Data collection and transmission
  • Condition assessment
  • State modeling
  • Change prediction
  • Pollution detection
  • Development of solutions to prevent negative environmental situations
  • Assessment of adverse consequences of state changes
